revision_description: def2-mTZVP (mTZVP) data transcribed from the Psi4 distribution (psi4/share/psi4/basis/def2-mtzvp.gbs, exported from ORCA), which encodes the B97-3c basis of Brandenburg, Bannwarth, Hansen, Grimme, J. Chem. Phys. 148, 064104 (2018)
description: def2-mTZVP (modified def2-TZVP for the B97-3c composite method)
name: def2-mTZVP
